_comment: Declarative config for the Bug Coordinator (run-pipeline.sh/.ps1). Edit this file to change stages, order, models (per-agent model lives in each agents/*.agent.md), paths, gates, permissions — no code change needed. {ARTIFACTS} expands to artifacts_dir.

stages.prompt: Read {ARTIFACTS}/bug-context.md and document each seeded issue with exact file:line evidence from src/.
Verify {ARTIFACTS}/research/codebase-research.md against src/ using the research-quality-measurement skill.
Read {ARTIFACTS}/research/verified-research.md and produce a 5-Whys root-cause chain per issue.

stages.question: Is the root cause correct and are we fixing the right thing?

stages.prompt: Read {ARTIFACTS}/verified-rca.md and write a before/after implementation plan with a test command and rollback per change.

stages.question: Are the changes appropriate, correctly scoped, and free of missing edge cases?

stages.prompt: Execute {ARTIFACTS}/implementation-plan.md; run '.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/' after each change; stop on failure.
Security-review the files changed per {ARTIFACTS}/fix-summary.md; report only (no edits).
Generate FIRST tests for the changed code (BUG-A boundary, BUG-B empty, VULN-1 injection-blocked) under tests/ and run pytest with coverage.
